rationale.R1.1: Reconstructing the contribution claim (LLM-judge closing half the gap vs. filter-based scoring, first chemist-paired benchmark) is necessary groundwork before any meaningful check can proceed.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chains experimental design → inter-annotator agreement → held-out accuracy → bias analysis → summary claim; verifying that each link holds without contradictions is a central checking task.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact is dense with specific quantitative claims (78.4% agreement, alpha=0.61, 7.1% order-swap rate, +4 pt verbosity lift); confirming that each figure is traceable to a described experimental step and not overclaimed is load-bearing — failure here invalidates the delegation.
